expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[Width], [Height],[Depth] 是总尺寸，[BoardThick] 是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan latar belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดรวม [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้ด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้พื้นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước tấm ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của tấm trên, tấm dưới và tấm bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của tấm nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa gabinete. Ang [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang Sukat, ang [BoardThick] ay Kapal ng materyal para sa Itaas, Ibaba, at Gilid na tabla, ang [BackBoardThick] ay Kapal ng materyal para sa tabla ng Likuran. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကက်ဘင်နက်အတွက် ပြားအရွယ်အစားများကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည် စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာမှုဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] သည် အပေါ်ပိုင်း၊ အောက်ပိုင်းနှင့် ဘေးဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်သည်။ [BackBoardThick] သည် နောက်ခံဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាទំហំ板សម្រាប់柜។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជាការវាស់ទំហំសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាម៉ាតេរីយ៉ាល់កម្រាស់板ដោយលើ, ក្រោម និងចំហៀង. [BackBoardThick] គឺជាម៉ាតេរីយ៉ាល់កម្រាស់板ក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະຫນາດຄອນຊິນສໍາລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນຂະຫນາດທັງໝົດ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງວັດຖຸສໍາລັບດ້ານບນ, ລຸ່ມ ແລະດ້ານຂ້າງ, [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງວັດຖຸສໍາລັບຄອນຊິນຫຼັງ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットのボードサイズを計算します。[Width], [Height], [Depth] は全体の寸法、[BoardThick] は上部、下部、側面のボード材料の厚さ、[BackBoardThick] は背面ボード材料の厚さです。 (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 전체 치수이며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드 재료 두께, [BackBoardThick]는 후면 보드 재료 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] es la medida total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour un cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les mesures totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieures, inférieures et latérales, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ist die Gesamtmessung, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platte, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पृष्ठभूमि बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] — это общие размеры, [BoardThick] — это толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковой доски, [BackBoardThick] — это толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
